title: Use of English – 2025 Admisión Titular B

questions.prompt: Adriana’s performance wasn’t as impressive as Julia’s.
answers: Julia’s performance was more impressive than Adriana’s

questions.prompt: Mike is so unfit because he never does any exercise.
answers: If Mike did exercise, he wouldn't be so unfit.
If Mike did some exercise, he wouldn't be so unfit.
If Mike did exercise, he would not be so unfit.
If Mike did some exercise, he would not be so unfit.
If Mike did exercise, he'd be so unfit.
If Mike did some exercise, he'd be so unfit.
If Mike did exercise, he would be fit.
If Mike did some exercise, he would be fit.
If Mike did exercise, he would be fitter.
If Mike did some exercise, he would be fitter.
If Mike did exercise, he'd be fit.
If Mike did some exercise, he'd be fit.
If Mike did exercise, he'd be fitter.
If Mike did some exercise, he'd be fitter.

questions.prompt: I have arranged to have lunch with Joyce today.
answers: I am having lunch with Joyce today.
I'm having lunch with Joyce today.
I am going to have lunch with Joyce today.
I'm going to have lunch with Joyce today.

questions.prompt: The babysitter takes care of Tommy in the afternoon.
answers: The babysitter looks after Tommy in the afternoon

questions.prompt: They were painting the house while we were away on holiday.
answers: The house was being painted while we were away on holiday.
We were having our house painted while we were away on holiday.
We were getting our house painted while we were away on holiday.

questions.prompt: You’ve been laughing at Sam’s little brother.
answers: The person whom you have been laughing at is Sam's little brother.
The person whom you have been laughing at was Sam's little brother.
The person whom you've been laughing at is Sam's little brother.
The person whom you've been laughing at was Sam's little brother.

questions.prompt: ‘I must hide Jane’s birthday present before she gets home,’ Karen said.
answers: Karen said that she had to hide Jane's birthday present before she got home.
John hasn’t got any brothers
John has not got any brothers
John hasn’t got any brothers or sisters
John has not got any brothers or sisters
John hasn’t got any siblings
John has not got any siblings

questions.prompt: The microwave was so heavy that I needed help to carry it.
answers: It was such a heavy microwave that I needed help to carry it.

questions.prompt: The six o’clock train to Brighton couldn’t leave because there was a storm.
answers: The six o'clock train to Brighton couldn't leave due to a storm.
The six o'clock train to Brighton could not leave due to a storm.
Due to a storm, the six o'clock train to Brighton couldn't leave.
Due to a storm, the six o'clock train to Brighton could not leave.

questions.prompt: Perhaps they didn’t hear the good news last night.
answers: They might not have heard the good news last night.
They mightn't have heard the good news last night.

questions.prompt: Houdini was believed to be a fabulous magician.
answers: People believed that Houdini was a fabulous magician.
